title: More Stone Tools
description: This Mod adds more Stone Tools, a whole set for each of 15 Stone Types.
body:
Have You ever Thought to Yourself "I wish i could make Stone Tools out of all 15 Stone Variants"? No? well i made this mod for that purpose anyways!

Included in this mod is a Tool family for each of the following Stone Types: Sandstone, Blackstone, Diorite, Granite, Andesite, Deepslate, Tuff, Calcite, Basalt, End Stone, Red Sandstone, Dripstone, Prismarine, and Glowstone.

The Glowstone Tools Glow in your hands, and every Stone Type has a Shovel, Pickaxe, Axe, Sword, and Hoe. each with a custome texture meant to look visually similar to its associated stone type.
